title: astragalus nivalis
intro: Astragalus nivalis, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species native to the high-altitude mountainous regions of the Himalayas and Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nivalis include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. Astragalus nivalis is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, and is commonly used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being and longevity.
